a.xlink:title: Builds StackLayoutParams from the current card list and zone geometry.
Computes the card index at a given y-coordinate within the zone's vertical layout....
Finds the topmost card in a given zone, considering attachments and Z-order.
Positions cards vertically with alternating left/right x-offsets.
Restores any cards that were hover-escaped but whose hover state was not properly cleaned up....
Toggles a zone view for a player.
Resizes the stack zone height, e.g. when sharing vertical space with the command zone.
Updates which card is currently hovered based on scene coordinates.
